value.title: Rapid Micro Biosystems Q1 2026 Earnings Call: Complete Transcript
value.summary: Rapid Micro Biosystems (NASDAQ:RPID) released first-quarter financial results and hosted an earnings call on Wednesday. Read the complete transcript below. Benzinga APIs provide real-time access to earnings call transcripts and financial data. Visit https://www.benzinga.com/apis/ to learn more. Access the full call at https://edge.media-server.com/mmc/p/rtnh53vx/ Summary Rapid Micro Biosystems reported Q1 2026 revenue of $8 million, marking an 11% year-over-year growth driven by system placement

value.title: Pharma’s manufacturing reconfigurations provide CDMOs with expansion opportunities
value.summary: A spike in facility sales to outsourcing companies points to an industry need for greater flexibility.

value.title: Cartography Biosciences Announces Strategic Investment From Samsung Ventures to Advance Oncology Pipeline
value.summary: SOUTH SAN FRANCISCO, Calif. & SEOUL, South Korea, May 06, 2026--Cartography Biosciences and Samsung Ventures today announced a strategic investment to support the advancement of Cartography’s differentiated oncology pipeline and expand its proprietary drug discovery platform.
